name: Graham Cracker Crust Made W/Homemade Crust Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups homemade graham cracker crust mix
recipeInstructions:
To make a crust for a 9-inch pie plate, springform pan or baking dish:
1. Combine the homemade graham cracker crust mix with melted butter.
2. Press the mixture over the bottom and sides of the pan.
3. Refrigerate for at least 45 minutes before filling.
4. If baking the crust, preheat the oven to 375°F.
5. Bake for 6-8 minutes, then cool completely before adding the filling.
Makes one 8-inch or 9-inch crust.
